milestones.title: MVP — Accept First External League
milestones.description: Everything needed before a non-OGBA league can use the platform.

tasks.title: Set up Stripe account + API keys
instructions: Go to https://dashboard.stripe.com/register and create an account
Verify business details (sole proprietor is fine for now)
Go to Developers → API Keys
Copy the Publishable Key and Secret Key
Add to .env: STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_live_xxx and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_live_xxx
Also set up a webhook endpoint at /api/stripe/webhook
Create two Products in Stripe Dashboard: 'Pro ($29/season)' and 'Commissioner ($49/season)'

tasks.title: Build Stripe Checkout integration
instructions: Install stripe package: npm install stripe
Create server/src/features/billing/routes.ts with checkout session endpoint
POST /api/billing/checkout — creates a Stripe Checkout session
POST /api/stripe/webhook — handles checkout.session.completed, subscription events
Store subscription status on User model (add isPro, subscriptionId fields)
Gate Pro features behind subscription check middleware

tasks.title: Commissioner self-serve roster import (CSV upload UI)
instructions: Add CSV upload UI to Commissioner page (file input + column mapping preview)
Accept Yahoo/ESPN/Fantrax CSV formats (auto-detect by column headers)
Show preview table before confirming import
Reuse existing auctionImport service on the backend
Add 'Download Template' button with example CSV

tasks.title: New league onboarding wizard (3-step)
instructions: Step 1: Create league (name, format, draft type) — already exists at /create-league
Step 2: Invite members (show invite code + email invite form)
Step 3: Import rosters OR start draft
Add progress indicator (1 of 3, 2 of 3, etc.)
Show 'Setup Checklist' on commissioner page until all steps complete

tasks.title: Email signup backend (Notify Me form)
instructions: Create POST /api/auth/subscribe endpoint
Store email in a new EmailSubscriber table (or use Resend audience)
Validate email format, prevent duplicates
Send welcome email via Resend
Wire up the marketing site form to this endpoint

tasks.title: Marketing site final polish
instructions: Review all 5 blog posts — apply formatting to posts 2-5
Deploy marketing site to GitHub Pages
Set up Monday blog deploy GitHub Action
Verify pricing section matches $0/$29/$49 seasonal model — DONE
Test email signup form end-to-end
Status page live at /status — DONE
Blog infrastructure + 5 posts written — DONE
Removed changelog and roadmap pages — DONE

milestones.title: Mid-Season Leagues — Accept Leagues Already In Progress
milestones.description: Allow commissioners to bring their league over mid-season with existing rosters and standings.

tasks.title: Mid-season roster import workflow
instructions: Allow commissioner to upload current rosters (CSV with player, team, salary)
Auto-match players to MLB IDs via fuzzy name matching
Set acquiredAt to season start date for all imported rosters
Create Period records for completed scoring periods
Mark imported rosters with source='IMPORT' for tracking

tasks.title: Historical stats backfill for current period
instructions: After roster import, trigger stats sync for all rostered players
Backfill PlayerStatsPeriod from season start to current date
Compute TeamStatsPeriod from player stats
Verify standings match FanGraphs/source platform

tasks.title: Skip SETUP → straight to IN_SEASON
instructions: Add 'Import Existing League' option that skips SETUP and DRAFT phases
Set season status directly to IN_SEASON after roster import
Ensure all IN_SEASON features activate (trades, waivers, stats sync)

tasks.title: Yahoo/ESPN/Fantrax CSV format auto-detection
instructions: Detect platform by CSV column headers (Yahoo: 'Player', ESPN: 'PLAYER', Fantrax: 'Player Name')
Map columns automatically to our format
Show preview with auto-detected mappings, allow manual override
Support keeper designation column if present

milestones.title: Growth — Scale Beyond OGBA
milestones.description: Features needed to support multiple leagues and grow the user base.

tasks.title: Multi-league dashboard (league switcher)
instructions: League switcher dropdown in sidebar — DONE
Shows all leagues user is a member of — DONE

tasks.title: Public league directory with detail pages
instructions: Rebuild /discover/:slug detail page (was removed as premature)
Add server-side slug lookup endpoint
Show league details, team list, join CTA
Gate join behind authentication

tasks.title: Referral / invite tracking
instructions: Track which invite code or referral link brought each user
Dashboard showing conversion funnel: invite sent → signed up → joined league
Commissioner can see who hasn't accepted their invite yet

tasks.title: Commissioner analytics dashboard
instructions: League engagement metrics: logins per week, roster moves, trades proposed
Inactive manager alerts (no login in 7+ days)
Season health score (are all managers active?)

milestones.title: Monetization — Charge Money
milestones.description: Revenue infrastructure. Don't rush this — get the product right first.

tasks.title: Stripe subscription management
instructions: Handle subscription lifecycle: create, renew, cancel, pause
Webhook handlers for invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.deleted
Grace period for failed payments (7 days before feature lockout)
Store subscription status on User model

tasks.title: Pro feature gating
instructions: Create requirePro middleware for server routes
Gate AI features (draft report, weekly insights, trade analysis) behind Pro
Show upgrade prompts on gated features for free users
Keep all other features free (drafts, standings, trades, waivers)

tasks.title: Commissioner tier features
instructions: League health dashboard (commissioner-only)
Custom scoring rule builder
Archive import (currently free — move to Commissioner tier)
Priority support badge

tasks.title: Billing portal + invoices
instructions: Stripe Customer Portal link for managing subscription
Invoice history page
Update payment method flow
Cancel/downgrade flow with feedback survey

tasks.title: Founding member lifetime deal ($99)
instructions: Create one-time payment product in Stripe ($99)
Limited to first 100 users
Grants permanent Pro access (no recurring charges)
Show counter: 'X of 100 remaining'
Announce via email list and blog post

milestones.title: Content & SEO — Blog Calendar + Topic Pipeline
milestones.description: Planned blog posts, SEO topics, and content strategy. Posts auto-publish on Mondays via GitHub Actions cron.

Tags: fantasy baseball, product
Hero image: baseball batter (Unsplash)
~950 words, TL;DR at top

~1,100 words

tasks.title: Apply SEO formatting to blog posts 2-5

Strategic bold (1-2 key phrases per section), single-sentence punchline paragraphs
Add hero images (Unsplash baseball photos) to each post
Internal links to /features, /pricing, /discover where relevant
Verify each post builds correctly with date gating

tasks.title: Topic: Top 10 Undervalued NL Pitchers for 2026
instructions: List format — great for SEO (people search 'best NL pitchers 2026')
Use real stats from the platform
Include Dodgers pitchers in the mix
Target date: May 12

tasks.title: Topic: The Fantasy Baseball Manager's Weekly Checklist
instructions: Evergreen content — what to do every week (check waivers, review matchups, set lineups)
Link to TFL features that automate each step
Good internal linking opportunity
Target date: May 19

tasks.title: Topic: Shohei Ohtani — Managing the Two-Way Fantasy Asset
instructions: Player-specific content — high search volume for 'Ohtani fantasy value'
Explain the DH + P split on TFL vs other platforms
Include Dodgers context (NL-only league impact)
Target date: May 26

tasks.title: Topic: Midseason Trade Strategy — When to Buy and When to Sell
instructions: Timely content for June/July trade deadline season
Use real examples from OGBA league (anonymized)
Link to TFL trade analysis AI feature
Target date: Jun 2

tasks.title: Topic: 5 Rookie Call-Ups That Could Win Your League
instructions: List format — search-friendly, shareable
Konnor Griffin (PIT) should be one of them
Include prospect data from our MLB API sync
Target date: Jun 9

tasks.title: Topic: Fantasy Football Preview — What TFL is Building Next
instructions: Cross-sport teaser — signals the football pivot planned for Aug 2026
Light on details, heavy on vision
Build email list excitement for football beta
Target date: Jun 16

tasks.title: Topic: The Best Fantasy Baseball Stats Nobody Tracks
instructions: Analytics-focused — talk about BB+H, category movers, spending pace
Shows domain expertise
Great for SEO: 'fantasy baseball advanced stats'
Target date: Jun 23

tasks.title: Topic: Top 5 Catchers for the Second Half
instructions: Position-specific list — catchers are always undervalued
Will Smith (LAD) as a featured player
Include stats comparison table
Target date: Jun 30

tasks.title: Topic: How We Went from Spreadsheets to AI — The Vibe Coding Story
instructions: Technical/founder angle — resonates with product/tech audience
More detail on the vibe coding journey
Mention Claude Code, specific features built
Target date: Jul 7

tasks.title: Topic: All-Star Break Power Rankings — Every NL Team's Fantasy Value
instructions: Timely content for mid-July
Rank all NL teams by fantasy value of their roster
Dodgers will likely be #1 — lean into it
Include data from TFL standings
Target date: Jul 14

milestones.title: SEO — Technical Setup & Analytics
milestones.description: Technical SEO checklist, analytics stack, and tracking. All tools are free tier. Full plan at docs/plans/2026-04-10-seo-strategy-plan.md

tasks.title: Install @astrojs/sitemap integration
instructions: npm install @astrojs/sitemap
Add sitemap() to astro.config.mjs integrations array
Builds sitemap-index.xml automatically
5 min effort

tasks.title: Create robots.txt for marketing site + app
instructions: Create public/robots.txt on marketing site: Allow: / + Sitemap reference
Add robots.txt to Express app: Disallow /api/, /auction/, /teams/. Allow /login, /signup, /discover
5-10 min effort

tasks.title: Install astro-seo — OG tags, Twitter cards, canonical URLs
instructions: npm install astro-seo
Replace manual meta tags in Base.astro with <SEO> component
Pass og:image from blog post heroImage
Add twitter:card=summary_large_image
Create default OG image at public/og-default.png (1200x630)
30 min effort

tasks.title: Add JSON-LD structured data to all pages
instructions: Create src/components/JsonLd.astro helper
Landing: Organization + SoftwareApplication schemas
Blog listing: CollectionPage schema
Blog posts: BlogPosting with author, date, image
Status page: add noindex (skip schema)
45 min effort

tasks.title: Self-host Inter font with font-display: swap
instructions: Download Inter woff2 from Google Fonts (400, 500, 600, 700, 800)
Place in public/fonts/
Add @font-face rules to global.css
Preload regular weight in Base.astro <head>
20 min effort

tasks.title: Set up Google Search Console + submit sitemap
instructions: Go to search.google.com/search-console
Add domain property: thefantasticleagues.com
Verify via DNS TXT record (add in Cloudflare DNS)
Submit sitemap-index.xml after sitemap integration is deployed
15 min effort

tasks.title: Add GA4 to marketing site
instructions: Create GA4 property: 'TFL Marketing'
Add gtag.js snippet to Base.astro <head>
Set up 4 custom events: signup_click, blog_read, pricing_view, cta_click
Link Search Console to GA4 in Admin > Product Links
DO NOT add GA4 to the React app — PostHog handles that
30 min effort

tasks.title: Set up Ahrefs Webmaster Tools (free) + Ubersuggest
instructions: ahrefs.com/webmaster-tools — free, 100 keywords
Track 25 initial keywords (see SEO plan for list)
Ubersuggest free: 1 project, 25 keywords, 3 searches/day
Monthly: export positions, compare month-over-month

tasks.title: List on AlternativeTo + indie directories
instructions: AlternativeTo: list as alternative to Yahoo Fantasy, Fantrax, ESPN, Sleeper
Also list on: Firsto, SideProjectors, LaunchingNext, StartupStash, SaaSPage
Write clear description: AI-powered, auction draft, commissioner tools
Total: ~1.5 hours for all directories

tasks.title: Build SEO landing pages (features + comparisons)
instructions: /features/auction-draft — target: fantasy baseball auction draft platform
/features/ai-insights — target: AI fantasy baseball analysis tools
/features/commissioner-tools — target: fantasy baseball commissioner tools
/compare/yahoo — target: Yahoo fantasy baseball alternative
/compare/fantrax — target: Fantrax alternative
/learn/fantasy-baseball-glossary — 60-100 terms
Each page: hero, problem, demo screenshot, 3-4 benefits, FAQ, CTA

tasks.title: Set up beehiiv newsletter
instructions: beehiiv.com — free tier up to 2,500 subscribers
Weekly during season, monthly offseason
Content: 1 insight + 1 data point + 1 product update
Use Recommendations feature to cross-promote with baseball newsletters

tasks.title: Build Auction Value Calculator lead magnet
instructions: Free web tool: input league settings (NL/AL/Mixed, budget, roster size)
Output custom dollar values per player
Ungated for use, email-gated for saving/exporting results
This directly showcases the product's strength
4-6 hours effort
